ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "grand_prix" TEXT /* Name of the grand prix */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the circuit where the race was held */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the race */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the race (e.g., completed, postponed, cancelled) */,
  "winner_driver_id" INTEGER /* Driver who won the race */,
  "winner_constructor_id" INTEGER /* Constructor who won the race */,
  "fastest_lap_driver_id" INTEGER /* Driver who achieved the fastest lap */,
  "fastest_lap_time_ms" INTEGER /* Time of the fastest lap in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_fastest_lap_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("fastest_lap_driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_winner_constructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_constructor_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_winner_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "circuits" (
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circuit */,
  "circuit_name" TEXT /* Name of the circuit */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the circuit */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the circuit is located */,
  "length_km" REAL /* Length of the circuit in kilometers */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the circuit in terms of spectators */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the circuit was established */,
  "track_type" TEXT /* Type of track (e.g., road course, street circuit, oval) */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., asphalt, concrete, dirt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the car */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the car */,
  "engine" TEXT /* Engine type used in the car */,
  "chassis" TEXT /* Chassis type used in the car */,
  "aerodynamics" TEXT /* Aerodynamics package used in the car */,
  "tyres" TEXT /* Type of tyres used in the car */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the car */,
  "top_speed_kph" INTEGER /* Top speed of the car in kilometers per hour */,
  "gearbox_type" TEXT /* Type of gearbox used in the car */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used in the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the driver is currently associated with */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the driver started their career */,
  "career_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the driver ended their career */,
  "super_license_number" TEXT /* Super license number of the driver */,
  "super_license_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the driver's super license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "team_principal" TEXT /* Name of the team principal */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* List of sponsors associated with the team */,
  "base" TEXT /* Location of the team's base */,
  "technical_director" TEXT /* Name of the technical director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car */,
  "race_position" TEXT /* Final race position of the driver */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the driver in the race */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the driver's race (e.g., finished, DNF, DNS) */,
  "number_of_laps_completed" INTEGER /* Number of laps the driver completed */,
  "number_of_pit_stops" INTEGER /* Number of pit stops the driver made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track condition */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "temperature_celsius" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "track_surface" TEXT /* Type of track surface */,
  "wind_speed_kph" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "cloud_cover" TEXT /* Amount of cloud cover */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_conditions_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver involved in the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., crash, spin, penalty) */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps the incident occurred */,
  "penalty" TEXT /* Penalty imposed, if any */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_incidents_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_incidents_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan engagement record */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "viewership" INTEGER /* Number of viewers for the race */,
  "social_media_interactions" INTEGER /* Number of social media interactions (e.g., likes, shares, comments) */,
  "ticket_sales" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold for the race */,
  "trackside_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of people who attended the race trackside */,
  "tv_viewership" INTEGER /* Number of viewers who watched the race on TV */,
  "online_streaming_views" INTEGER /* Number of viewers who streamed the race online */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the sponsor belongs to */,
  "sponsored_teams" TEXT /* List of teams sponsored by the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_value_usd" REAL /* Value of the sponsorship in USD */,
  "sponsorship_duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the sponsorship in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_sponsored_teams FOREIGN KEY ("sponsored_teams") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_finances" (
  "finance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial data */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue of the team */,
  "total_expenses" REAL /* Total expenses of the team */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss of the team */,
  "revenue_from_sponsorships" REAL /* Revenue from sponsorships */,
  "revenue_from_merchandise" REAL /* Revenue from merchandise sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_finances_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_career_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career statistics record */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver */,
  "total_races" INTEGER /* Total number of races participated in */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of race wins */,
  "total_podiums" INTEGER /* Total number of podium finishes */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned in the career */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won */,
  "pole_positions" INTEGER /* Number of pole positions achieved */,
  "fastest_laps" INTEGER /* Number of fastest laps achieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_career_stats_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "lap_time_ms" INTEGER /* Average lap time in milliseconds */,
  "top_speed_kph" INTEGER /* Top speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "acceleration_0_100_kph" REAL /* Acceleration from 0 to 100 kilometers per hour in seconds */,
  "fuel_consumption_lap" REAL /* Fuel consumption per lap in liters */,
  "downforce_level" REAL /* Level of downforce generated by the car */,
  "drag_level" REAL /* Level of drag generated by the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_performance_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_performance_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race schedule */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "practice_1_start" TEXT /* Start time of the first practice session */,
  "practice_1_end" TEXT /* End time of the first practice session */,
  "practice_2_start" TEXT /* Start time of the second practice session */,
  "practice_2_end" TEXT /* End time of the second practice session */,
  "qualifying_start" TEXT /* Start time of the qualifying session */,
  "qualifying_end" TEXT /* End time of the qualifying session */,
  "race_start" TEXT /* Start time of the race */,
  "race_end" TEXT /* End time of the race */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_schedules_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver standing */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the driver after the race */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the driver in the standings after the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_standings_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_standings_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constructor_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constructor standing */,
  "constructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the constructor */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the constructor after the race */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the constructor in the standings after the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constructor_standings_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constructor_standings_constructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("constructor_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
